modules.title: FastAPI Reference Template
modules.subtitle: A reference guide for building FastAPI services
modules.description: Covers Swagger metadata, architecture, async database layer, ORM models, Pydantic schemas, CRUD routers, sub-collection endpoints, and MCP server integration.
